briefs.title: BC Gaming Facilities Must Meet New Security and Surveillance Rules by April 2026
briefs.summary: A new Security and Surveillance Regulation under BC's Gaming Control Act takes effect April 13, 2026, setting formal rules for access control, cash handling, and camera coverage at provincial gaming facilities.
briefs.action_required: Review your gaming facility's security and surveillance setup against the new regulation before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Gaming Security and Surveillance Regulation takes effect
